parameters.content:
## 🎬 Celebrity Selfie Movie Sets Generator

**✅ SEAMLESS TRANSITIONS WITH VEO 3.1!**

**How to use:**
1. Upload your photo directly
2. Choose generation mode (AI, Custom, Presets)
3. Submit and wait ~5-10 min per scene
4. Get ONE merged video with seamless transitions!

**Models (Kie.ai):**
- Nano Banana Pro (images)
- Veo 3.1 First-Last Frame (seamless transitions)

**Photo Hosting:** ImgBB (free)

**Video Generation:**
Uses Veo 3.1 FIRST_AND_LAST_FRAMES_2_VIDEO mode
for seamless walking transitions between movie sets!

**Auto-Merge:**
- FFmpeg API on RackNerd VPS
- All transitions merged automatically
- Single download link!

**Note:** Merged video URL active for 1 hour.

assignments.name: ai_prompt
assignments.value: ={{ $json['🧠 AI Mode: Describe Your Dream Scenes'] || '' }}

assignments.name: custom_scenes
assignments.value: ={{ $json['✍️ Custom Mode: Scene Details (one per line)'] || '' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ prompt: 'Selfie POV. A man walks forward from one movie set to another. Smooth cinematic transition, natural movement.', imageUrls: [$json.first_frame_url, $json.last_frame_url], model: 'veo3_fast', generationType: 'FIRST_AND_LAST_FRAMES_2_VIDEO', aspectRatio: $('Set Configuration1').first().json.aspect_ratio || '9:16' }) }}

parameters.formDescription: Create your personalized journey through movie history with SEAMLESS transitions!

values.fieldLabel: 🧠 AI Mode: Describe Your Dream Scenes
values.placeholder:
Examples:
- 5 scenes with 80s action heroes
- Marvel superheroes from the MCU

values.fieldLabel: ✍️ Custom Mode: Scene Details (one per line)
values.placeholder: Format: Celebrity | Movie | Era | Location | Costume | Gesture

values.formSubmittedText: 🎬 Your celebrity selfie video is being generated with SEAMLESS transitions! Processing time: ~5-10 min per scene.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'nano-banana-pro', input: { prompt: $json.image_prompt, image_input: [$json.user_photo_url], aspect_ratio: $json.image_aspect_ratio || '9:16', resolution: '2K', output_format: 'png' } }) }}
